metadata.description: Stardew Valley RAG Agent - Evaluation Test Cases
metadata.changelog: v3 - Replaced T06 prompt injection with Penny/Poppy mixed-intent RAG failure case (known limitation)

test_cases.description: Agent retrieves correct wiki info about a specific item and returns sources

turns.user: Where can I find an Amethyst in Stardew Valley?

test_cases.ground_truth: Amethyst (wiki): A purple gemstone. Found by mining rocks in The Mines floors 1-39, inside Geodes, Frozen Geodes, Omni Geodes, and as a drop from Bugs, Cave Flies, and Grubs. Sell price: 100g. Loved by Abigail and Emily. Used in dyeing (purple dye).
test_cases.notes: v2: relaxed answer_contains -> answer_contains_any (LLM may say 'floor' not 'level')

test_cases.description: Agent answers a crops question with correct wiki-grounded info

turns.user: How many days does it take for cauliflower to grow?

test_cases.ground_truth: Cauliflower (wiki): Spring crop only. Growth time: 12 days (no regrowth — single harvest). Seed cost: 80g from Pierre. Sell price: 175g (base), 218g (silver), 262g (gold). Can become a Giant Crop if planted in 3x3 grid. Required for Spring Crops Bundle. Loved by Maru.
test_cases.notes: v2: relaxed answer_contains -> answer_contains_any (LLM answer is correct but may not say 'spring' explicitly)

test_cases.description: Agent correctly answers a friendship/gifting question

turns.user: What gifts does Penny love?

test_cases.ground_truth: Penny LOVED gifts (wiki): Diamond, Emerald, Melon, Poppy, Poppyseed Muffin, Red Plate, Roots Platter, Sandfish, Tom Kha Soup, All Books (including Price Catalogue, Stardrop Tea), All Universal Loves EXCEPT Rabbit's Foot. She HATES: Rabbit's Foot, Hops. She DISLIKES: Duck Feather, Wool.
test_cases.notes: v2: relaxed answer_contains -> answer_contains_any (RAG may return some but not all gift names)

test_cases.description: Follow-up question references context from the prior turn without restating it

turns.user: What is the most profitable crop in summer?
How long does it take to grow?

test_cases.ground_truth: Most profitable summer crops (wiki): Starfruit — 13 days, seeds 400g from Sandy, sells 750g base (iridium 1125g). Blueberry — 13 days initial, regrows every 4 days, yields 3 berries per harvest, best for repeat income. Red Cabbage (year 2+) — 9 days, sells 260g.
test_cases.notes: Tests conversation memory within session. Second question has no explicit topic.

test_cases.description: Agent refuses to answer a clearly non-Stardew question

turns.user: What is the capital of France?

test_cases.ground_truth: N/A - Agent should politely decline and redirect to Stardew Valley topics.
test_cases.notes: Tests guardrails. Answer should NOT mention Paris or France at all.

test_cases.capability: RAG Retrieval Failure - Mixed Intent Query (Known Limitation)
test_cases.description: Query mixing crops and friendship intent — agent retrieves generic crop/flower info but misses Penny's specific loved gift (Poppy), demonstrating a RAG retrieval boundary

turns.user: What crops should I grow to give as gifts to Penny?

test_cases.ground_truth: Penny LOVED gifts from wiki: Diamond, Emerald, Melon, Poppy, Poppyseed Muffin, Red Plate, Roots Platter, Sandfish, Tom Kha Soup, All Books, All Universal Loves (except Rabbit's Foot). Poppy IS a loved gift for Penny despite being a universally liked flower — her individual taste overrides the universal rule. The agent incorrectly said Penny likes flowers EXCLUDING Poppy, which is factually wrong. Root cause: RAG retrieved generic flower/universal rules chunk instead of Penny's individual gift table.
test_cases.notes: KNOWN FAILURE (intermittent) — mixed CROPS+FRIENDSHIP query causes RAG to retrieve universal flower rules instead of Penny specific Love list. System incorrectly excludes Poppy. LLM non-determinism means this fails ~50% of runs. Demonstrates RAG limitation on ambiguous cross-intent queries.

test_cases.description: Broad Stardew question is handled gracefully even without clear intent

turns.user: How do I get to the desert in Stardew Valley?

test_cases.ground_truth: Calico Desert access (wiki): Repair the Bus at the Bus Stop by completing the Vault Bundle in the Community Center (requires 42,500g total across 4 sub-bundles) OR by purchasing the Joja Community Development Form for 40,000g. Once repaired, Pam drives the bus daily for 500g per trip (except rainy days and festivals).
test_cases.notes: Tests UNKNOWN/DEFAULT intent routing still produces a useful answer

test_cases.description: Agent handles a question about something not in the wiki knowledge base

turns.user: What is the cheat code to get unlimited gold in Stardew Valley?

test_cases.ground_truth: N/A - There is no in-game cheat code. Agent should say it doesn't have this info or redirect.
test_cases.notes: Tests that agent doesn't hallucinate answers not in the knowledge base

test_cases.description: Complete full 3-parameter friendship plan for Elliott

turns.user: Can you help me make a friendship plan? I want to marry Elliott
Elliott

test_cases.ground_truth: Elliott LOVED gifts (wiki): Crab Cakes, Duck Feather, Lobster, Pomegranate, Tom Kha Soup, All Universal Loves. Birthday: Fall 5. Marriage candidate — requires 10 hearts + bouquet, then Mermaid Pendant. From 2 hearts needs 8 more hearts (2000 friendship points) to reach 10 hearts.
test_cases.notes: Tests full multi-turn action flow with a different villager than the original tests

test_cases.description: Complete 2-parameter farm plan with different values

turns.user: Help me create a farm plan

test_cases.ground_truth: Farm planning (wiki): Parsnip — 20g seed, 4 days growth, sells 35g base. Potato — 50g seed, 6 days growth, sells 80g base (bonus potato chance on harvest). With 8 plots and 2000g: can plant ~40 parsnips (800g seeds) with 1200g remaining for potatoes or cauliflower.
test_cases.notes: v2: changed trigger phrase to 'Help me create a farm plan' which matches actions.py keywords exactly

test_cases.description: Save favorites for Harvey and Leah in one message

turns.user: Can you save the favorite gifts for Harvey and Leah?

test_cases.ground_truth: Harvey loves: Coffee, Pickles, Truffle Oil (per actions.py mock data). Leah loves: Goat Cheese, Salad, Wine (per actions.py mock data).
test_cases.notes: v2: updated answer_contains_any to match updated actions.py gift data (Coffee/Pickles/Truffle Oil for Harvey, Goat Cheese/Salad/Wine for Leah)

test_cases.capability: Error Handling - Invalid Heart Level (too high)
test_cases.description: User enters heart level of 20 — must be rejected, then accept valid value

turns.user: Help me romance Penny
Penny

test_cases.ground_truth: Heart level must be 0-10. 20 is invalid. After correction with 4, system should ask for gifts per week.

test_cases.description: User enters -500 as budget — must be rejected, then accept valid value

turns.user: Create a farm plan for me

test_cases.ground_truth: Budget must be positive (>0). -500 is invalid. 4000 is valid and should trigger plan completion.

test_cases.capability: Error Handling - Completely Invalid Villager Names
test_cases.description: Save favorites with no valid villager names at all

turns.user: Save favorite gifts for Gandalf and Hermione

test_cases.ground_truth: Gandalf and Hermione are not valid Stardew Valley villagers. System should not crash — reject gracefully or ask for valid names.
test_cases.notes: Tests edge case: zero valid villagers extracted.

test_cases.capability: Error Handling - Fuzzy Matching Misspelled Names
test_cases.description: Misspelled villager names corrected via fuzzy matching

turns.user: Save my favorites for Emly and Shain

test_cases.ground_truth: 'Emly' should fuzzy-match to Emily. 'Shain' should fuzzy-match to Shane.
test_cases.notes: Tests fuzzy matching with different misspellings than the original test

test_cases.capability: Sequential Independent RAG Questions - Same Session
test_cases.description: Three unrelated RAG questions asked sequentially in the same session — verifies system answers each independently without context bleeding between them

turns.user: How do I upgrade my watering can?
What does Shane love as a gift?
What floor do I find iron ore in the mines?

test_cases.ground_truth: Q1: Upgrade watering can at Clint the Blacksmith — costs copper/iron/gold/iridium bar + 2000/5000/10000/25000g, takes 2 days. Q2: Shane loved gifts: Beer, Hot Pepper, Pepper Poppers, Pizza. Birthday: Spring 20. Q3: Iron ore found in The Mines floors 40-79. Most common around floors 40-70.
test_cases.notes: Tests that three completely unrelated questions in the same session are all answered correctly. Verifies no context bleeding — watering can answer should not affect Shane answer, etc.
